title: ophrys doerfleri subsp. mouterdeana
intro: Ophrys doerfleri subsp. mouterdeana is a rare, endemic orchid species found in Corsica, known for its unique and distinctive appearance. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may provide health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, Ophrys doerfleri subsp. mouterdeana is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal use.
